title: Full-stack Engineer
tagline: I design and ship real, multi-stack products — web, mobile, and AI.
summary: Full-stack engineer who takes products from a blank repo to something people actually use. I work across the stack — Next.js, React, NestJS, Astro, Vue, Python/FastAPI — on top of Postgres, Supabase, Docker and CI, and I'm comfortable owning the parts most engineers hand off: data modelling, auth and row-level security, payments, e2e testing, and shipping to production. Recent work spans a healthcare-professional marketplace, a hyperlocal social app, an AI novel-generation pipeline, and commercial websites.
available: Open to senior full-stack / product engineering roles at ambitious companies worldwide — fully remote, or relocation with visa sponsorship (US / UK / EU / Canada).
